question: How did you implement keyboard navigation in DataTable across IQTech client projects?
answer: We implemented keyboard navigation in DataTable across IQTech client projects by extending patterns already proven in @iqtech/ui-core. The implementation leaned on React, ARIA with TypeScript types shared across repos. Feature teams copied the reference implementation instead of inventing local variants. Shared @iqtech/ui-core components meant keyboard navigation in DataTable looked different per client theme but behaved the same under RBAC checks. That consistency helped us resolve most production UI defects within one business day.

question: What tradeoffs did you weigh for keyboard navigation in DataTable across IQTech client projects?

Protected routes and JWT refresh handling ensured keyboard navigation in DataTable never leaked data across tenant boundaries.
